source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #61
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. The Hologram News Network posted a video about how to claim a memory fragment in the Star Atlas Never Alone
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
STAR ATLAS #179 NEVER ALONE
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
How to Claim a Star Atlas Memory Fragment – Never Alone
The Hologram News Network posted a video about how to claim a memory fragment in the Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
Metaverse Nomads #94 Star Atlas – Never Alone
Metaverse Nomads posted a replay of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
STAR ATLAS: Never Alone social campaign 2023 | FULL TUTORIAL | Quests Cheat Sheet
Winston posted a video tutorial of the Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
STAR ATLAS: Never Alone – Rewards Explained
RahMega posted a video discussing the rewards in Never Alone.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #79
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
NEVER ALONE – A GUIDE TO MISSION 1
Aephia published a guide to Mission 1 of the Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
Star Atlas : Fan-Fiction and Lore – The adventure to Never Alone
PockThePirate posted a video of some fan fiction in Star Atlas.
STAR ATLAS – Grinding For Our First Ship (Zero to Hero)
Atlas Theory posted a video on episode 2 of his Zero to Hero series.
STAR ATLAS #180 Questing with Zealy
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of his experiences of questing in Never Alone.
Star Atlas News Never Alone Escape Velocity
Beyond the Horizon 2620 posted a video of Star Atlas news.
Former Star Atlas CRO Speaks on Departure
The Hologram published an article about the former Star Atlas CRO departure.
The Atlas Star Issue #18
Star Atlas published their latest newsletter.
